text: A bag of marbles costs £p. Tom buys 3 bags and pays with a £10 note. He receives £4 change. What is the value of p?
generatorSolution:
Step 1: Tom pays £10 and gets £4 change, so he spent £10 − £4 = £6.
Step 2: He bought 3 bags, so 3 × p = £6.
Step 3: Divide both sides by 3: p = £6 ÷ 3 = £2.
The answer is £2.
